name: education digest: a no-change run produces an empty but valid digest
command:
: > d.jsonl
bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/curriculum-digest.sh" --deltas d.jsonl --out-dir out --now 2026-06-08T12:00:00Z
node -e 'const j=JSON.parse(require("fs").readFileSync("out/2026-06-08T120000Z.json","utf8"));process.exit(j.topic_count===0 && Array.isArray(j.new_technology) && typeof j.pillars==="object"?0:1)' && echo empty-ok 1>&2
